title: Reading and Use of English – Part 8
description: You are going to read an article about four people who have embarked on a creative pursuit. For questions 47–56, choose from the people A–D. The people may be chosen more than once.

texts.A:
### Alex, Amateur Painter
As someone who picked up a paintbrush only recently, [49]the initial attempts[/49] were less than impressive. I always thought creating art would be a solitary experience, but [53]I was surprised how communal it could become[/53]. Joining local workshops and sharing ideas with fellow enthusiasts brought unexpected inspiration. I was intimidated at first,[47] but I quickly adapted to a routine of regular practice[/47]. Witnessing my progress over months was hugely satisfying. [55]Exploring different techniques[/55] opened new perspectives, enriching my creativity. The community support played a critical role as critiques steered me towards improvement in ways I never imagined possible. Besides enhancing skills, [54]it feels like a soul-satisfying journey[/54].
texts.B:
### Brooke, Digital Illustrator
Deciding to take up digital illustration was daunting initially due to [47]the technological learning curve[/47] involved. Surprisingly, I hadn’t expected to settle in so fast with the tools and techniques. [50]The abundance of online resources[/50] really simplified my journey. While the solo aspect of working digitally can be isolating at times, [51]I’ve found online communities offer great support[/51]. They not only provide feedback but also encourage improvement continuously. Each project has helped refine my skills and express stories visually. [56]Finding inspiration in everyday life[/56], every illustration feels like a personal milestone. These creative ventures have reconstructed my understanding of art and its role in my life, making the process an exhilarating experience.
texts.C:
### Charlie, Songwriter
Writing songs began as a way to destress, [48]but now it's grown into a crucial part[/48] of my identity. Creating melodies and lyrics allows me to express emotions[53] I rarely share openly[/53]. Initially, [52]overcoming fear of vulnerability[/52] was challenging, yet liberating. Each song crafted is a reflection of personal experiences, making the connection with the audience profoundly rewarding. Collaborating with other musicians introduced me to diverse perspectives, [49]which were invaluable[/49] for evolving my style. Sharing creations at local gigs pushed me out of my comfort zone, but the audience's reactions fostered a sense of accomplishment. [55]Music, as a creative outlet[/55], has reshaped how I perceive and interact with the world around me.
texts.D:
### Dana, Creative Writer
Initially skeptical about my ability to craft compelling narratives, [50]the fear of a blank page[/50] was immense. [56]However, the act of writing[/56] soon became second nature, transforming into a cathartic escape from daily life pressures. Writing circles provided a platform to present my work, and [51]feedback from peers[/51] was pivotal in refining my storytelling abilities. Along the way, [48]realizing how characters come alive[/48] in readers' minds through mere words was eye-opening. Documenting imaginative worlds enriched both my creative vision and linguistic skills. The surprises along the journey, like [54]finding joy in revision[/54], proved the worth of perseverance. Ultimately, it’s been a transformative endeavor that connects me with a community of like-minded enthusiasts.

questions.question: mentions being surprised by how quickly they adapted to a new routine?
questions.explanation: B says: 'I hadn’t expected to settle in so fast...'

questions.question: mentions realizing how personal elements enrich their work?
questions.explanation: C talks about songs being reflections of personal experiences.

questions.question: mentions that different perspectives were invaluable in their development?
questions.explanation: C mentions learning from collaborations, enhancing their style.

questions.question: mentions fear or hesitation about starting due to technical aspects?
questions.explanation: D refers to fear of the blank page and technological hurdles.

questions.question: mentions finding support and feedback crucial from online communities?
questions.explanation: B emphasizes the role of online communities in their progress.

questions.question: mentions overcoming the fear of being vulnerable?
questions.explanation: C discusses overcoming vulnerability through songwriting.

questions.question: mentions that communal activities brought unexpected benefits?
questions.explanation: A talks about workshops and communities enhancing creativity.

questions.question: mentions feeling satisfied with their progress over time?
questions.explanation: D discusses transformative results and satisfaction with revisions.

questions.question: mentions that their creative pursuit serves as an enriching outlet?
questions.explanation: C refers to music as a vital creative outlet.

questions.question: mentions finding inspiration in everyday experiences?
questions.explanation: B discusses how everyday life inspires their digital illustrations.
